title: RWA Market Reaches $51B as Tokenized Private Credit Leads Growth
summary: The real-world asset (RWA) market has hit $51 billion, with tokenized private credit driving much of the growth. Figure leads the sector with $18 billion in tokenized assets, according to Bernstein Research.
body:
The real-world asset (RWA) market has reached a total value of $51 billion, according to data from Bernstein Research. This growth is largely driven by tokenized private credit, which is becoming a significant part of the crypto ecosystem. 

Figure, a major player in the RWA space, has tokenized $18 billion in assets, making it the leading platform in this sector. Tokenized private credit is particularly appealing because it allows for fractional ownership and easier transfer of traditionally illiquid assets. 

This growth in RWAs could make crypto investments more accessible to everyday investors. By tokenizing real-world assets like real estate, private credit, and commodities, more people can gain exposure to these markets with lower barriers to entry. 

For those interested in RWAs, watching platforms like Figure and tracking regulatory developments will be crucial. As the market grows, expect more traditional financial institutions to explore tokenization, potentially opening up new investment opportunities. Read more → https://cointelegraph.com/news/rwa-market-cap-51-billion-tokenized-private-credit-bernstein?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
